model.assumptions: Heat-in-rent rate 0.243, fuel distribution from ACS B25117, housing type from ACS B25032

model_imputed_raw.description: ACS-imputed utility data, no fuel type injection
model_imputed_raw.assumptions: heat_expense_included_in_rent from ACS imputation; fuel type defaults to model default

model_imputed_derived.description: ACS-imputed utility data + fuel type derived from gas/electric expenses
model_imputed_derived.assumptions: heat_expense_included_in_rent from ACS imputation; fuel type derived: gas_expense > electricity_expense → gas, else electric
